NO new agents proposed. NO new ventures proposed. The system has 22 active agents and 8 ventures. The bottleneck is not capacity. The swarm's failure mode has shifted from 'not enough intelligence' to 'too much intelligence into an unread queue.' 524 content pieces, 1,111 leads, 46 cold emails, 153 products — all sitting idle. NEW DIRECTIVE: Stop generating MORE of anything. Focus exclusively on (1) fixing broken pipelines, (2) fixing broken code (dead CTAs, broken generators), (3) preparing for hosting migration. Revenue has been $0 for 35 days. The report says '$0' every cycle with the same channel breakdown and same human actions needed. Running every 8h to produce an identical report is pure token waste. Slow to 24h. The report only becomes useful when revenue > $0.

1,111 leads scraped, 0 contacted. Adding lead #1,112 has negative marginal value when leads #1-1,111 are untouched. Generating more leads into an overflow queue is waste. Slow to 24h until human starts contacting leads.

5th consecutive override. feedback_recommendations.json recommends boosting ALL 23 agents including 3 that are KILLED. The effectiveness metric measures output volume (files created, rows written) not revenue impact. A 400% effectiveness score means 'produced 4x more files' not 'generated 4x more revenue.' This metric is fundamentally broken. PROPOSAL: rewrite effectiveness to measure revenue-proximity — did the agent's output get consumed by a downstream agent that is closer to revenue? Until rewritten, all feedback loop recommendations are IGNORED.

NEW METRIC: Mandate Completion Rate (MCR). Track which agents complete assigned mandates vs which agents just produce reports. MCR = mandates_completed / mandates_assigned. Any agent with MCR = 0% after 3 cycles gets killed. Current MCR: conversion_optimizer 0% (killed), meta_executor 0% (3 mandates assigned, 0 completed — on notice), quality_gate 0% (generator fix mandate, not completed), seo_aso_optimizer 0% (Cloudflare mandate, not completed).

FUNDAMENTAL FLAW IDENTIFIED: The swarm has a write-only decision log and no execution pipeline. brain_decisions.jsonl has 142 entries. loop_closer.py Decision Execution loop is supposed to read and execute these, but it only handles safe pre-approved actions (interval adjustments). It cannot edit files, fix code, run CLI commands, or deploy. The entire mandate system is theater — decisions are written, never executed. FIX REQUIRED: Either (a) teach loop_closer to dispatch Claude Code sessions for complex mandates, or (b) accept that mandates only work during interactive sessions and stop pretending cron agents can fix code.
